description_long: This snowman is constructed from three distinct, vertically stacked snowball segments, each progressively smaller from base to top. Its surface is predominantly white, with a slightly uneven, lumpy texture characteristic of hand-packed snow. The face features two dark coal-like eyes, a prominent orange carrot nose, and a curved line of small dark objects forming a mouth. Three dark buttons are vertically aligned down the front torso. The snowman has two stick arms, each extending outward and slightly upward, with a natural, irregular shape. No headwear or additional accessories are present, giving it a classic, simple appearance suitable for parks or residential sidewalks.
description: A classic three-segment snowman with coal eyes, a carrot nose, stick arms, and button details, all set against a lumpy white snow surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the snowman's face with coal eyes, carrot nose, stick mouth, three buttons, and both stick arms clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the snowman's profile, the curvature of the snowballs, and the left stick arm extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the snowman's head and body visible, both stick arms extending backward, and no facial features or buttons visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the snowman's profile, the right stick arm, and the rounded shape of the snowball segments.
